title: MduX-rust Regulatory Justification
description: Ties a specific MduX-rust design decision to a specific regulatory-standard clause, with a human-readable rationale and pointers to substantiating evidence. Shared across all five standards documented under docs/ — see docs/governance/citation-convention.md.

justification_id.description: Sequential, unique across the whole corpus (not per-standard).

clause_ref.description: Citation key in the docs/governance/citation-convention.md format, e.g. 'IEC 62304:2006 §5.2 Software development planning'.

rationale.description: Why/how MduX-rust's design addresses or informs this clause. Original prose, not a restatement of the clause.

requirement_id.description: Optional cross-reference to a mdux-governance::RequirementId when this justification backs a specific tracked requirement.

evidence_refs.description: File paths, ADR filenames, or example directory names substantiating the rationale.
